name: Rogz Dog Utility Control Multi Leash Large - Pink
shortDescription: Rogz Dog Utility Control Multi Lead/Leash Large – Pink
description: Rogz Control Multi Dog Lead/Leash is a versatile Lead/Leash for both training and dog's who pull. This Lead/Leash puts you in control and aids behaviour correction with the stop-pull steering. Key Features: Behaviour correction with the stop-pull function Adjustable Lead/Leash allowing you to choose a Lead/Leash length Reflective webbing making you and your furry friend visible Waste bag holder to make it easy to clean up after your dog. The Lead/Leash works best when used with a harness that has both front and back attachment points like the Rogz Control or Utility Harnesses Size: Length 2.0m, Width 2.0cm
